title: sphaeropteris hirsuta
intro: Sphaeropteris hirsuta, also known as the hirsute tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical rainforests of New Guinea and surrounding islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris hirsuta include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sphaeropteris hirsuta include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
